summary: Backend-only testing of Excel Spontaneous BF and HRV sheet per-drug row highlighting. All 14 tests PASSED. Verified: (1) Spontaneous BF sheet drug readout rows highlighted with per-drug fill colors (F3E8FF for drug 1, EDE9FE for drug 2) and bold font, (2) Spontaneous HRV sheet drug readout rows highlighted with same per-drug colors and bold font, (3) Multiple drug rows have different purple shades, (4) Baseline row highlighted with baseline_fill color (E0F2FE), (5) All columns in highlighted rows have consistent fill, (6) Non-readout rows have no special highlighting, (7) Disabled drugs are not highlighted. Also verified placeholder='0' in AnalysisPanel.js lines 924 and 942.
critical_code_review_comments: export_utils.py lines 1952-1994: drug_window_colors dict correctly maps BF window strings to drug indices
export_utils.py lines 2023-2034: BF sheet correctly applies per-drug fill colors using drug_fills[drug_idx % len(drug_fills)]
export_utils.py lines 2072-2113: drug_minute_colors dict correctly maps HRV minutes to drug indices
export_utils.py lines 2150-2161: HRV sheet correctly applies per-drug fill colors using drug_fills[drug_idx % len(drug_fills)]
export_utils.py lines 2027,2154: Bold font (bold_data_font) applied to both baseline and drug readout rows
AnalysisPanel.js lines 924,942: Placeholder changed from '12/14' to '0' as requested
seed_data_creation: Created mock test data with 2 drugs (Tetrodotoxin start=3 delay=0 + Acetylcholine start=6 delay=0) with per-drug settings (tetrodotoxin: hrvReadoutMinute=1, bfReadoutMinute=2, acetylcholine: hrvReadoutMinute=3, bfReadoutMinute=4, enabled=true). Expected BF rows: 5-6 (Drug 1) and 10-11 (Drug 2). Expected HRV rows: minute 4 (Drug 1) and minute 9 (Drug 2).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel Spontaneous BF and HRV sheet per-drug highlighting feature fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_excel_spontaneous_sheets_highlighting.py. Colors: Drug 1=F3E8FF, Drug 2=EDE9FE, Baseline=E0F2FE. All highlighting uses bold font. Disabled drugs are correctly excluded from highlighting.

features_verified.bf_sheet_drug2_highlighted: PASS - EDE9FE fill + bold font at window 10-11
features_verified.bf_sheet_different_drug_colors: PASS - Drug 1 and Drug 2 have different purple shades
features_verified.hrv_sheet_drug1_highlighted: PASS - F3E8FF fill + bold font at minute 4
features_verified.hrv_sheet_drug2_highlighted: PASS - EDE9FE fill + bold font at minute 9
features_verified.hrv_sheet_different_drug_colors: PASS - Drug 1 and Drug 2 have different purple shades
features_verified.all_columns_consistent_fill: PASS - All columns in row have same fill color
features_verified.normal_rows_no_highlight: PASS - Non-readout rows have no special fill
features_verified.disabled_drug_not_highlighted: PASS - Disabled drug rows not highlighted
